caption:
✨Our Annual General Meeting is officially wrapped! 🎬
It was a great time to look back at everything we’ve gone through this year😎 — the games, the teamwork and of course all the memories that made both on and off the court！！🫂

The AGM also gave us a chance to reflect, share ideas and talk about how we can keep improving as a club moving forward.💪🌟

Huge appreciation to our outgoing committee for all the hard work and dedication behind the scenes — none of this would be possible without you 🫶 At the same time, welcome to the new committee! 👋
New faces, new energy and fresh ideas — we’re excited for what’s coming next.🌤️

Thank you to everyone who attended and supported the meeting. Let’s keep the momentum going and make this year even bigger and better. More games, more matches and more memories ahead 🔥🏐

Best regards,
MMU Volbees / MMU Volleyball Club 24/25
“One Dream, One Team”

MMU girls, this one’s for you!!💥

Volleyball isn’t just about skills — it’s about commitment, consistency and mindset. The Volbees Girls Team Selection is open to players who are willing to learn, train seriously and grow as part of a team 💪🔥

Whether you’re new to team selections or already have playing experience, everyone is welcome. Come play, learn and prove yourself through action ✨🏐

🗓 14th January 2025 (Wednesday)
⏰ 9:00PM – 11:45PM
📍 Volleyball Court, MMU Cyberjaya

Think you’re ready? Sign up and take that first step.

Best Regards,
MMU Volbees / MMU Volleyball Club 25/26
“One Dream, One Team”

📢 ANNOUNCEMENT – MMU VOLLEYBALL CLUB ANNUAL GENERAL MEETING (AGM) 2025

Dear Volbees Members,

We are excited to invite all Volbees members to our Annual General Meeting (AGM), where we will reflect on the past year, share important updates, and plan for the future. ✨

🗓 Date: 15 December 2025 (Monday)
⏰ Time: 8:00 PM – 10:00 PM
📍 Venue: CLC CNMX1005

Light snacks and drinks will be provided to make the session more enjoyable 🥳

To help us prepare, please confirm your attendance, even if you are unable to join by completing the form below:
🔗 https://forms.office.com/r/bdtpDx4rGx

The AGM will include:
* Presentation of annual reports
* Updates on club activities and achievements
* Appreciation ceremony for current committee members
* Introduction of the new High Committee for Term 25/26

Your participation is essential in supporting the growth and transparency of our club. We encourage everyone to join and be part of this important session.

Thank you for your continued support, and we look forward to seeing you there!

Best regards,
MMU Volbees / MMU Volleyball Club 24/25
"One Dream, One Team"

New year, New Energy, New Experience✨
Come check us out!

✅Member Registration Open Up
✅New Term, Fresh Start !!!

Best regards,
MMU Volbees / MMU Volleyball Club 25/26

‼️ ANNOUNCEMENT ‼️
🏐 Updated Weekly Schedule – MMU Cyberjaya Volleyball Club 🏐

📌 Reminders Before You Play:
🚭 Smoking and vaping around the court area are strictly prohibited.
👟 Sports shoes are required — no shoes, no play.

✅ Daily attendance is not compulsory — feel free to come whenever you can!

Let’s make the most of our time on the court — see you there!

MMU Volbees / MMU Volleyball Club 24/25
“One Dream, One Team”
MMU Girls' Friendly Match

👥 𝐕𝐎𝐋𝐁𝐄𝐄𝐒 𝐇𝐈𝐆𝐇 𝐂𝐎𝐌𝐌𝐈𝐓𝐓𝐄𝐄 𝐑𝐄𝐂𝐑𝐔𝐈𝐓𝐌𝐄𝐍𝐓

As we transition into a new term, the MMU Volleyball Club is opening recruitment for our next High Committee lineup. ✨

If you’re passionate about volleyball, enjoy working with others, and would like to contribute to organizing club activities, we welcome you to fill in the form and express your interest. All candidates will be invited for an interview session as part of the selection process. ❤️‍🔥

You may scan the QR code above or access the form using the link below:
🔗 https://forms.office.com/r/Lqq4RtmWYZ

Thank you for your dedication and willingness to support the club! 💪🏻🏐

Best regards,
MMU Volbees / MMU Volleyball Club 24/25
"𝑶𝑵𝑬 𝑫𝑹𝑬𝑨𝑴, 𝑶𝑵𝑬 𝑻𝑬𝑨𝑴"

Big thank you to UPTM and MMU for the amazing friendly match! 🤝💛
It was a great experience filled with good energy, teamwork, and sportsmanship.

We truly enjoyed sharing the court with all of you and hope to have more matches together in the future! 🔥

Calling all MMU boys ready to step up.🫵💪

If volleyball is your thing and you’re ready to push your limits, this is your chance to take it to the next level. The Volbees Boys Team Selection is coming up!! We’re looking for players who are committed, competitive and willing to put in the work on court👊🔥

Come test yourself, learn from the process and see where your game stands. No long talk — just show up, play hard and let your performance speak🏐

Date: 29th January 2025 (Thursday)
Time: 9:00PM - 11:30PM
Venue: Volleyball Court, MMU Cyberjaya 

Ready to take the first step? Here’s the form to sign up!

https://forms.office.com/r/SnhTxtP7eT

Best Regards,
MMU Volbees / MMU Volleyball Club 25/26
“One Dream, One Team”

‼️ ANNOUNCEMENT ‼️
🏐 Updated Weekly Schedule – MMU Cyberjaya Volleyball Club 🏐

We’re excited to roll out our new weekly session schedule, designed to create a more dynamic and enjoyable environment for all members. Whether you’re looking to improve your skills, enjoy a friendly game, or just stay active, we’ve got something for you every night of the week!

🔥 Join us for:
Members Day, Funplay sessions, Girls Training, and Boys Training – each designed to suit different playing styles and goals. ✨

⸻

📅 Weekly Schedule:
🔹 Monday: Girls Training (8:00 PM – 11:00 PM)
🔹 Tuesday: Funplay (9:00 PM – 11:45 PM)
🔹 Wednesday: Members Day (9:00 PM – 11:45 PM)
🔹 Thursday: Boys Training (9:00 PM – 11:45 PM)
🔹 Friday: Funplay (9:00 PM – 11:45 PM)

⸻

📌 Reminders Before You Play:
🚭 Smoking and vaping around the court area are strictly prohibited.
👟 Sports shoes are required — no shoes, no play.
👕 Please come dressed in suitable sports attire.

✅ Daily attendance is not compulsory — feel free to come and go as you wish.

⸻

Let’s make the most of our time on the court — see you there!
🏐💪

Best regards,
MMU Volbees / MMU Volleyball Club 24/25
“One Dream, One Team”

📢 𝐈𝐌𝐏𝐎𝐑𝐓𝐀𝐍𝐓 𝐔𝐏𝐃𝐀𝐓𝐄 - 𝐕𝐎𝐋𝐁𝐄𝐄𝐒 𝐂𝐔𝐏 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟓

Updated Tournament Details:
🆕️ Date: 𝟭𝟮-𝟭𝟰 𝗦𝗲𝗽𝘁𝗲𝗺𝗯𝗲𝗿 𝟮𝟬𝟮𝟱 (𝗙𝗿𝗶𝗱𝗮𝘆-𝗦𝘂𝗻𝗱𝗮𝘆)
🕖 Time: 7:00 PM – 11:00 PM (Friday)
🕓 Time: 4:00 PM – 11:00 PM (Saturday & Sunday)
📍 Venue: MMU Cyberjaya Volleyball Court

✅ 𝗢𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝘁𝗼 𝗮𝗹𝗹 𝗠𝗠𝗨 𝗦𝘁𝘂𝗱𝗲𝗻𝘁𝘀 & 𝗠𝗠𝗨 𝗔𝗹𝘂𝗺𝗻𝗶

💰 Early Bird Rates – Don't miss out on these
unbeatable deals:
 •  Members: R̶M̶1̶5̶  𝗥𝗠𝟭𝟬 𝗢𝗡𝗟𝗬‼️
 •  Non-members: R̶M̶1̶8̶  𝗥𝗠𝟭𝟮 𝗢𝗡𝗟𝗬‼️

Why you should join❓️
🏆 𝗣𝗹𝗮𝘆 𝗠𝗼𝗿𝗲! Guaranteed 2–3 matches in BO3 format
🏅 𝗘𝘃𝗲𝗿𝘆 𝗽𝗹𝗮𝘆𝗲𝗿 𝗴𝗲𝘁𝘀 𝗮 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝘁𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗠𝗲𝗱𝗮𝗹
🌆 Exciting evening vibes
💵 Cash prizes for winners

👥 No team? No worries! 𝗣𝗠 𝘂𝘀 to join a dedicated group and connect with others

𝐑𝐄𝐆𝐈𝐒𝐓𝐄𝐑 𝐍𝐎𝐖:
👉🏻 https://forms.office.com/r/2adZVAA4sb

🔥 You can’t find this cheap price that includes a participation medal anywhere else — secure your spot now! 🚀

The new MMU Volbees Club Tee is officially here and available for preorder! Get your hands on the latest Volbees Club Tee, designed for both style and comfort. Made from high-quality microfiber polyester (170 GSM), this lightweight and breathable fabric is perfect for volleyball sessions, matches, or casual wear.

Pre-Order Details:

📌 Pre-order period: 25/3/2025 (Tuesday) – 28/3/2025 (Friday)
📌 Price: RM20 (Members) | RM23 (Non-Members)
📌 Collection location: TBA
📌 Collection dates: 14/4/2025 (Monday) – 15/4/2025 (Tuesday)

Don’t miss out on this fresh design—secure your tee today before prices go up! 🏐💛

Click the link below or scan the QR code in the poster to place your order:
https://forms.office.com/r/gU9Dx8rLMc

✉️ For any inquiries, please contact:
📩 @volbees_mmu
📞 011-10798378 (Zhi Yun)

Best regards,
MMU Volbees / MMU Volleyball Club 24/25

🎉🐾 GO WILD with MMU Cyberjaya Volleyball Club at CSRW 2025! 🐾🎉

Come join the MMU Cyberjaya Volleyball Club—where we train harder, compete with passion, and have fun every step of the way. Whether you’re new to volleyball or a seasoned player, there’s a spot for YOU in our pack! 🦅🐺🐆
Unleash your wild side and be part of the action this CSRW!

🌟 What’s waiting at our animal-themed booth?
✅ Fun mini games & activities
✅ Meet our passionate team
✅ Exclusive access to our brand-new CLUB-TEE drop! 👕🔥

Want in? Fill in the forms now!
Club Registration: https://forms.office.com/r/fUY7SVTEsM
Club Tee Order: https://forms.office.com/r/ekpv5maRWU

‼️Weekly Schedule Alert ‼️

Ready for an exciting semester of volleyball? 🏐 🏅
Join us for team training, members day and plenty of funplay
 — or just enjoy a game, we’ve got something for everyone! 
Check out what’s happening:

This Semester’s Lineup:
•Monday: Boys & Girls Team Training (9:00pm - 11:45pm) 
•Tuesday: Members Day (9:00pm - 11:45pm)
•Wednesday: Funplay (9:00pm - 11:45pm) 
•Thursday: Funplay (9:00pm - 11:45pm) 
•Friday: Funplay (9:00pm - 11:45pm) 

A few friendly reminders before you step on the court 
🚭No smoking or vaping near the court
👟 Sports shoes required to play
👕 Dress in suitable sports attire 

No daily attendance required —— come as you can! See you on the court! 🏐

MMU Volbees/MMU Volleyball Club 24/25
“One dream, One Team”

🇲🇾🥳Celebrate the spirit of Merdeka with MMU Cyberjaya Volleyball Club! Like our nation’s journey, volleyball is about teamwork, resilience, and striving for greatness. Let‘s spike towards unity and freedom, on and off the court! ✨🏐🎉

Have a good holiday & HAPPY MERDEKA DAY!🇲🇾❤️‍🔥

Sincerely,
MMU Volbees/MMU Volleyball Club 23/24

Members Day Recap🔥 

Thank you to all the members who joined Members' Day! ❤️‍🔥 We hope you had a great time, made some new friends, and learned something useful. Take a well-deserved break, enjoy your time off, and we look forward to see you again and get ready for more fun with volleyball next semester! 🏐✨

📷 @pk_oooi

🎃 Get Ready for Haunting Fun with MMU Cyberjaya Volleyball Club! 🏐👻

Hi everyone! We’ve prepared some thrilling surprises at our booth during CSRW—don’t miss out!

💀 Remember to renew or register to be part of our club for Term 24/25!

Whether you're a newcomer or a regular, come showcase your volleyball skills, connect with teammates, and be part of a vibrant and supportive community that shares your passion for the game! 🏐🔥

📆 Date: 20th - 21st Nov 2024
